title: 德国法院做出有利于泰瑞达机器人公司的裁决，并对精英机器人公司发出禁令
summary: Teradyne has obtained an injunction from a German court as it pursues a claim against Elite Robots for copying its UR cobot software. The post German court rules in favor of Teradyne Robotics, issues injunction against Elite Robots appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：German court rules in favor of Teradyne Robotics, issues injunction against Elite Robots）
